creator: legatvs@gmail.com
text:
The PR was submitted by the maintainer of this port.
My email appears to be missing from the submission
for some reason. I'm assuming that's what triggered
the category fix.

> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.

I approve the patch, in any case.
